'''鈭歵-k-l-g''' ('''kataklegoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:voteban|voteban]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-k-l-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:voteban|voteban]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歵-k-l-g
|-
! Lemma
| kataklegoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thitaklegoko|thitaklegoko]] || [[word:jitaklegoko|jitaklegoko]] || [[word:shitaklegoko|shitaklegoko]] || [[word:kitaklegoko|kitaklegoko]]
|-
